name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 26% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

typeLine: Surgeon's Quicksilver Flask of the Impala
explicitMods: 35% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills can Fork an additional Time

Projectiles from Supported Skills have 40% chance for an additional
Projectile when Forking
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that create minions which can be damaged. Cannot support triggered skills.
explicitMods:
Minions from Supported Skills take 15% of Hit Damage from their Life before
you if they are your only Minion
Minions from Supported Skills have 50% more maximum Life if they are your only Minion
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills can Fork an additional Time

Projectiles from Supported Skills have 40% chance for an additional
Projectile when Forking
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

name: The Fledgling
explicitMods: Projectiles cannot collide with Enemies in Close Range
flavourText: The single well-placed arrow that changes the world
must be preceded by ten thousand practice shots.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which adds lightning damage to spells and attacks. If you kill a shocked enemy, this skill will create a storm, causing lightning bolts to strike enemies around you for a duration. The damage inflicted by this skill is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Storm Hits an Enemy every 0.25 Seconds
Storms Hit Enemies with 23% increased Frequency
Creates a storm when you Kill a Shocked Enemy
Buff grants 19 to 76 Added Attack Lightning Damage
Buff grants 19 to 76 Added Spell Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 28.8% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 20% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff adding cold damage to spells and attacks. If you shatter an enemy, this skill will cause them to explode and deal AoE cold damage to enemies near them. This damage is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Attack Cold Damage
Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Spell Cold Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Eagle Ward
explicitMods: 1% chance to receive additional Blight items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
5% chance to receive additional Divination Card items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance in Heists for Items to drop fully linked

name: Foulborn Esh's Mirror
explicitMods: Shocks you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres
Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage for each Shocked Enemy you've Killed Recently
flavourText: She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 38 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 528 total Damage from Hits
Supported Skills require 10% reduced amount of Damage taken to Trigger
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 19.7 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Yoke of Suffering
explicitMods: 30% reduced Duration of Ailments on Enemies
Enemies take 9% increased Damage for each type of Ailment you have inflicted on them
flavourText: Let the unrepentant be dragged ever downwards by the weight of their sins.

name: Replica Voidwalker
explicitMods: You have Phasing if you've Killed Recently
Projectiles Chain +1 times while you have Phasing
flavourText: "Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 15% increased Chaining range
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

name: The Taming
explicitMods: 10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite

48% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for
each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
flavourText: "Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Wine of the Prophet
explicitMods: Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

explicitMods: 70% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills

name: Carcass Jack
flavourText: "...The discomfort shown by the others is amusing, but none
can deny that my work has made quite the splash..."
- Maligaro's Journal

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 Resonance for each Element. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Elemental cause you to gain 25 Resonance of other Elements per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Resonance per second of each Element you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 3% more Elemental Damage per 5 of lowest Resonance
Supported Skills penetrate 16% Elemental Resistances while each Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a projectile from a Wand that causes a series of area explosions in a secondary radius around its point of impact, each damaging enemies.

Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets

explicitMods: Adds 12 to 26 Cold Damage to Attacks
9 to 17 Added Fire Damage with Wand Attacks
fracturedMods: Adds 13 to 28 Fire Damage to Attacks
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 6% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
